summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mestar Agricultural Equipment website. Backend APIs 83.3% functional, frontend UI and integration working excellently. Quote form with Shadcn Select dropdown successfully integrates with backend. Bilingual TR/EN support working perfectly.

minor_bugs.issue: API accepts invalid data (empty name, invalid email) and returns 200 instead of 422 validation error
minor_bugs.impact: Low - doesn't break functionality but should validate input data

ui_bugs.issue: Some navigation items in mobile menu may have visibility issues when clicking

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero slider, navbar, language toggle
Language toggle (TR/EN) switches all content correctly
Navigation between all pages (Home, About, Products, Media, Quote)
Product categories page shows 4 categories correctly
Product detail pages show specs and features
Quote form submission works with backend integration
Shadcn Select dropdown shows 12 product options
Mobile navigation menu toggle opens correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor backend validation improvement needed: API should return 422 for invalid quote data instead of accepting it. Mobile menu navigation could be improved for better visibility.

success_percentage.integration: 100% (quote form to backend API working perfectly)
